title: throwaway-prototype framing for a design question
invocation_hint: Invoke SKI-PRO-1004 (throwaway-prototype) and decide whether the design question below warrants a prototype, and if yes, scope it.
task_description: The team is debating whether to use server-sent events vs WebSockets for a real-time notifications stream. Apply throwaway-prototype to scope the smallest experiment that resolves the tradeoff.
